converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Home Economics Department of Food and Nutrition records
New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Food and Nutrition
Carter Meter, Mary.
23-14-2485
3.2 cubic feet. 3.2 cubic feet.
1927-1970. Records, minutes, correspondence, plans of work, publications, reports, photographs. Records and photographs of faculty and graduate students in the Department of Food and Nutrition of the College of Home Economics. Collection material in English 2088192
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
April 4, 2003
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, August 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, March 2016
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
In 1969 the Department of Food and Nutrition and the Department of Institution Management merged to become the Department of Human Nutrition and Food.
In 1974 the Board of Trustees voted to abolish the Department of Human Nutrition and Food in the College of Human Ecology and the Graduate School of Nutrition to establish the Division of Nutritional Sciences, an intercollege unit within the Colleges of Agriculture and Life Sciences and Human Ecology.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, annual reports, minutes of meetings, plans of work, Purnell and Blackhead-Jones Research material, and subject files concerning World War II. Also photographs (identified) of faculty and graduate students in the Department of Food and Nutrition, taken at Mt. Pleasant Lodge, of the Cornell Outing Club, and a notebook kept by Mary W. Meter.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Committees/Commissions Boxes 2, 3
Series II. Correspondence Boxes 2, 3
Series III. Extension Files Box 1
Series IV. Plans of Work Box 1
Series V. Publications Boxes 2, 3
Series VI. Research Files Boxes 1, 2
Series VII. Reports Boxes 1, 3
Series VIII. School of Nutrition Files Box 1
Series IX. Subject Files Boxes 1-3
Series X. Photographs Box 4
Cite As:
Department of Food and Nutrition records, #23-14-2485. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. 4-H clubs -- New York (State) World War, 1939-1945 -- Food supply -- United States. Victory gardens. Nutrition. Infants -- Nutrition. Home economics -- Study and teaching. Children -- Nutrition. Women college students. Nutritional science -- Study and teaching. Cornell University -- : Pictorial Works. New York State College of Home Economics -- : Faculty. New York State College of Home Economics -- : Students. New York State College of Home Economics New York State College of Home Economics -- : Curricula.
